case_title: YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. VS. HEMANSHU PATEL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PATEL, HEMANSHU $2,013.62 PRINCIPAL, $159.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,172.62, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
